mapper.select:
select a.out_put_id, a.pollutant_code, a.standard_value, a.avg_value, a.surplus_value from t_data_hour_left_emission_info a where a.out_put_id in
#{item}
select table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema = database() and table_name like #{tableNameLike}

select.foreach:
select '${tableName}' as tableName, data_info as dataInfo,
date_format(monitor_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as monitorTime
date_format(monitor_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as monitorTime
date_format(monitor_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H') as monitorTime
date_format(monitor_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as monitorTime
date_format(monitor_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as monitorTime
from ${tableName} where data_type = #{dataType} and monitor_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime}
order by monitor_time asc
order by monitor_time desc
limit #{limit}

mapper.select: select pollutant_code as pollutantCode, sum(emissions) as emissions from t_ent_annual_emission where ent_code = #{entCode} and emission_year = #{emissionYear} group by pollutant_code
